Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}In times like these, the best course of action is to sleep during class![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}That adrenaline rush you get from dozing off right in front of the teacher can really spice up your dreams.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2026 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}It's real addicting, ain't it? After you build up the {f 4 30 2 1 1 0} to do it once, you gotta try it again![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}...Then again, since I'm not listening to the lecture, I'm pretty much screwed later![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Oh, but we have classic literature today... That means we're stuck with Mr. Nasty ol' Ekoda.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2051 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Whoa, you take studying pretty seriously, huh. But it takes real {f 4 30 2 1 1 0} to sleep in class, you know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}...Then again, since I'm not listening to the lecture, I'm pretty much screwed later![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Oh, but we have classic literature today... That means we're stuck with Mr. Nasty ol' Ekoda.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}...What's with that wary look in your eye? I'm Kenji Tomochika. We're in the same class.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I heard from Iori that you're pretty close with Takeba-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Well, I guess it doesn't matter. I'm looking for someone with a little more experience anyway.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Oh crap... It's almost time for the morning assembly. C'mon, we better hurry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I heard from Iori that you're pretty close with Takeba-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Well, I guess it doesn't matter. I'm looking for someone with a little more experience anyway.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Oh crap... It's almost time for the morning assembly. C'mon, we better hurry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Dude, was the rumor about you and Takeba-san coming to school together even true?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Anyways, you must be pretty unlucky to have to transfer here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Wait... You seriously don't know? Weird stuff's been happening at this school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}There are a couple of folks who say they've heard strange voices...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}But I guess since you're always wearing those headphones, you probably haven't heard anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Anyways, you must be pretty unlucky to have to transfer here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Wait... You seriously don't know? Weird stuff's been happening at this school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}There are a couple of folks who say they've heard strange voices...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}But I guess since you're always wearing those headphones, you probably haven't heard anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4014 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Good morning. Have you gotten acclimated to our school yet?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4070 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I see. Your ability to adapt to a new environment is impressive.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}By the way, if you ever need me for anything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Most times you can find me in the lounge. However, I won't be present if there's business I must attend to.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}If {f 0 1 2}I'm not at the dorm{f 0 1 27} at night, then you'll have to {f 0 1 2}put off any exploration{f 0 1 27} for another day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Well, that's understandable. So much seems to be happening these days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}By the way, if you ever need me for anything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Most times you can find me in the lounge. However, I won't be present if there's business I must attend to.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}If {f 0 1 2}I'm not at the dorm{f 0 1 27} at night, then you'll have to {f 0 1 2}put off any exploration{f 0 1 27} for another day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Well, it is already May... Isn't it crazy how fast time flies?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}And I'm sure there's a lot more to come, too... Apathy Syndrome might not go away any time soon either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Since we're the only ones who can fight Shadows, maybe we should be working harder...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I need to get stronger, too. I can't have someone else protecting me all the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}And I'm sure there's a lot more to come, too... Apathy Syndrome might not go away any time soon either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Since we're the only ones who can fight Shadows, maybe we should be working harder...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I need to get stronger, too. I can't have someone else protecting me all the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}How's it going? Do you feel like you're getting stronger after every battle?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Keep on training. With real battle experience, you'll be ready for whatever comes our way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I'll be fully recovered in no time, so you can count on me to help out on the front lines.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But don't let your guard down just 'cause I got your back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Just keep on training. With real battle experience, you'll be ready for whatever comes our way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I'll be fully recovered in no time, so you can count on me to help out on the front lines.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But don't let your guard down just 'cause I got your back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2014 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Wassup, my dude? It's another glorious day with our good ol' buddy, sleep deprivation...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}The day before yesterday though? That was wild.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I've never felt that kinda thrill in my entire life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Don't you think things have been gettin' real excitin' lately?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}We pretty much won the battle and saved the city from total annihilation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Plus, we pretty much won the battle and saved the city from total annihilation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}There've been fewer new cases of Apathy Syndrome the last few days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Senpai said it's probably because we beat that Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}If that's the case, then we did a pretty good job![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}We can't be celebrating just yet though since we have midterms next week...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Let's just hope nothing like that happens again until midterms are over.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Speaking of midterms, Junpei told me something...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Apparently, Kirijo-senpai is going to give us a reward if we do well on our exams.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 6 25 25}But I bet her standards are so high that we won't get anything unless we make the top ten in our grade...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1051 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}You really think so? But it's still good that there are less incidents.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}We can't be celebrating just yet though since we have midterms next week...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Let's just hope nothing like that happens again until midterms are over.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Speaking of midterms, Junpei told me something...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Apparently, Kirijo-senpai is going to give us a reward if we do well on our exams.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 6 25 25}But I bet her standards are so high that we won't get anything unless we make the top ten in our grade...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4014 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Good morning. Exams begin next week. Are you prepared?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}{f 0 1 2}If you get good exam scores, I'll give you a little something{f 0 1 27}... Consider it a reward.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}To be honest, I'm not as well prepared as I should be. I'm still preoccupied with monitoring Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}At any rate, the number of incidents has decreased since our last mission.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}If we can continue to defeat them, we may be able to rid the public of their fear...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But that large Shadow we encountered recently was clearly much more powerful than the one in April.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Even if we include Akihiko in our ranks after he fully recovers, we're still lacking manpower.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I hope you're just being modest. Regardless, make sure you're studying diligently.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}{f 0 1 2}If you get good exam scores, I'll give you a little something{f 0 1 27}... Consider it a reward.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}To be honest, I'm not as well prepared as I should be. I'm still preoccupied with monitoring Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}At any rate, the number of incidents has decreased since our last mission.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}If we can continue to defeat them, we may be able to rid the public of their fear...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But that large Shadow we encountered recently was clearly much more powerful than the one in April.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Even if we include Akihiko in our ranks after he fully recovers, we're still lacking manpower.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}The doctor said I'm almost fully recovered, so... I couldn't wait to get some exercise.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}It's 'bout time for me to get back in the ring... After midterms next week, I'll be ready for club activities and fighting Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}That's why I'm trying to make up for lost time. The last thing I want to be is a burden.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3121 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}*huff* The opposite, actually... *huff* I ran all the way here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}The doctor said I'm almost fully recovered, so... I couldn't wait to get some exercise.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}It's 'bout time for me to get back in the ring... After midterms next week, I'll be ready for club activities and fighting Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}That's why I'm trying to make up for lost time. The last thing I want to be is a burden.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}If the doctor gives me the OK today, I'll be able to fight with you guys again... Finally.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}You've been doing a good job {f 0 1 2}choosing what day to explore Tartarus and leading the team{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}You don't seem to have any trouble doing either, so I want you to keep it up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}That way, I can just focus on getting stronger. What do you say?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3039 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Great. I already talked to Mitsuru, and she was fine with it. Good luck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3031 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}You've got this. I'll be there to support you, too, of course.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I already talked to Mitsuru, and she was fine with it. Good luck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}This morning, Junpei left earlier than usual, looking like the world was about to end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Yeah, no kidding. This is the same Junpei who's always running late.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Our midterm scores are going to be revealed today, so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}He said he's gonna beg the teachers for a higher score before they get posted.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Oh, by the way, you remember that girl Sanada-senpai was talking about? Yamagishi-san?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I heard she has a weak constitution... But that's just a rumor. I wonder what she's really like.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}But having more people join us in our fight is good news, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Our midterm scores are going to be revealed today, so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}He said he's gonna beg the teachers for a higher score before they get posted.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Oh, by the way, you remember that girl Sanada-senpai was talking about? Yamagishi-san?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I heard she has a weak constitution... But that's just a rumor. I wonder what she's really like.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}But having more people join us in our fight is good news, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}Dude, I'm a laughing stock... You know what I heard these two cute first-year girls saying?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}"Did you see the exam results? Specifically Iori-senpai's?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}Do you understand what I'm going through!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}My heart is in shambles... And we're not even getting a new girl on the team.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}...No, wait. It's too early to give up hope. We still haven't heard back from her yet![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}How can we get her to join us? I should figure out what to say to convince her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2050 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Really? You say that, but I bet your scores are still higher than mine...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}Dude, I'm a laughing stock... You know what I heard these two cute first-year girls saying?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}"Did you see the exam results? Specifically Iori-senpai's?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}Do you understand what I'm going through!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}My heart is in shambles... And we're not even getting a new girl on the team.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}...No, wait. It's too early to give up hope. We still haven't heard back from her yet![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}How can we get her to join us? I should figure out what to say to convince her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2025 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}About that girl, Fuuka Yamagishi. I haven't lost hope that she'll join our team.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}And, yeah, she does look kinda frail, but that just makes me wanna be strong enough for the two of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2007 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 4 25 25}How can I be calm when another girl might be moving into our dorm!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}I'm talking about Fuuka Yamagishi. I've actually seen her around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}She does look kinda frail, but that just makes me wanna be strong enough for the two of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}The student body seems to be rather restless lately, don't you agree?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}You don't sense it...? Well, I only hope it doesn't have anything to do with Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Akihiko said we may be receiving a new member, but we still don't know when we'll be attacked.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}I thought so. Well, I only hope it doesn't have anything to do with Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Akihiko said we may be receiving a new member, but we still don't know when we'll be attacked.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}...I'm just gonna do my best from today onwards![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1076 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 2 25 25}The ghost story, duh! Did you already forget what we talked about last night?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I'm gonna look into everything there is about it. Remember, we'll {f 0 1 2}share our findings{f 0 1 27} on Friday![n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Could you also try gathering information, too, {f 4 1}-kun? Like, maybe you could talk to some students after school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I'm gonna look into everything there is about that ghost story. Remember, we'll {f 0 1 2}share our findings{f 0 1 27} on Friday![n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Could you also try gathering information, too, {f 4 1}-kun? Like, maybe you could talk to some students after school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Hey, are you looking into that ghost story? Like, asking around about it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}I think she's taking this way too seriously, dude. Guess she can be pretty stubborn.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Besides, I have plenty of scary stories up my sleeve.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I bet the story I told the other night made your hair stand on end. They say it's true though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Well, not like I've done anything myself... I say we just let Yuka-tan handle it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}I think she's taking this way too seriously, dude. Guess she can be pretty stubborn.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}As for me, I have plenty of scary stories up my sleeve already.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I bet the story I told the other night made your hair stand on end. They say it's true though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}I spent so much time thinking about ghost stories that now I'm having nightmares...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But there are so many stupid rumors going around that it's tough trying to make sense of this whole thing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I did get some useful info though, so I plan on digging even deeper today![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Try to remember what you find out at school, okay, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}There are just so many stupid rumors going around that it's tough trying to make sense of this whole thing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I did get some useful info though, so I plan on digging even deeper today![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Try to remember what you find out at school, okay, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}We're gonna share our findings about the ghost stories tonight![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Yep, I heard some pretty interesting stories while asking around...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Anyway, don't forget about tonight, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I heard some pretty interesting stories while asking around at school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Yamagishi and Moriyama are recovering nicely. They'll be released from the hospital in the next few days.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}We'll need to invite Yamagishi to the dorm and explain what happened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Considering that power of hers... we could definitely use her help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4025 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}We'll need to invite Yamagishi to the dorm and explain what happened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Considering that power of hers... we could definitely use her help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Do you think Kirijo-senpai saved Yamagishi-san because it was the right thing to do?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Or was it just because she's a Persona-user and we need her...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_082_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Well, I guess it's really up to Yamagishi-san whether or not she joins us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Sorry to bring this up out of the blue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Either way, I guess it's really up to Yamagishi-san whether or not she joins us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Sorry to bring this up out of the blue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Hey, {f 4 1}-kun... What do you think of Yamagishi-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Doesn't it feel like she wasn't really given a choice in joining the team?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_087_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}I mean, yeah, her Persona ability is pretty amazing, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Doesn't it seem like she wasn't really given a choice in joining the team?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Yamagishi will be living in the dorm with us starting today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}And from this point on, she'll be providing us with support in Tartarus at night.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}That means I can start joining battles again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Even if I'm a bit slow starting out, rest assured that I'll catch up to you all in no time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_091_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Even if I'm a bit slow starting out, rest assured that I'll catch up to you all in no time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I guess it's true that there have been fewer cases of Apathy Syndrome after our missions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}But then again, that changes as we get closer to the next full moon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}...By the way, what do you think of Kirijo-senpai?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1065 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}Don't you think she sort of pushed Fuuka into joining too quickly?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}I know it's nice to have more Persona-users around, especially in battle, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_095_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}It's just... don't you think she sort of pushed Fuuka into joining too quickly?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}I know it's nice to have more Persona-users around, especially in battle, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_096_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4029 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Oh, there you are. Good timing. There's something I have to tell you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}From now on, you no longer need my permission to go to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_098_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4059 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Because Yamagishi can provide support. If she's present, you won't need my help.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But I did tell her not to let you go {f 0 1 2}if both Akihiko and I are not available{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I'm just worried something unexpected may happen... So please keep that in mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}One more thing. Could you set aside some time tonight?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}It won't take too long. All right then, I'll see you later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_099_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Yamagishi will be in charge of supporting the team from now on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But I did tell her not to let you go {f 0 1 2}if both Akihiko and I are not available{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Just in case something unexpected happens. So please keep that in mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}One more thing. Could you set aside some time tonight?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}It won't take too long. All right then, I'll see you later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_100_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}The night before last... when we learned about the twelve Shadows and their connection to Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}Isn't there just too much we don't understand?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_104_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}...Hey, is it just me, or has Yuka-tan been acting weird lately?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_106_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2094 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}You should really pay attention a little more, dude.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}She's been thinkin' way too hard about why Tartarus exists and all that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_107_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}She's been thinkin' way too hard about why Tartarus exists and all that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_108_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}In about a week, there'll be another mission...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_110_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}Do we just keep going on these missions until we defeat all eight remaining Shadows?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}Blindly following orders to get stronger by going to Tartarus and fighting Shadow after Shadow...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}I've been thinking about this for a while. I feel like Kirijo-senpai is hiding something from us...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_111_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}I just wonder if we're gonna keep going on these missions until we defeat all eight remaining Shadows...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}Blindly following orders to get stronger by going to Tartarus and fighting Shadow after Shadow...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}I've been thinking about this for a while. I feel like Kirijo-senpai is hiding something from us...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_112_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}The next full moon is almost upon us... Are you feeling prepared?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_114_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}According to the cycle, it should appear on {f 0 1 2}July 7th at midnight{f 0 1 27}... That's six days from now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}The number of incidents has also been increasing as we've gotten closer to the full moon, so stay alert.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_115_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Think carefully about what we're fighting for.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}According to the cycle, our next mission will be on {f 0 1 2}July 7th at midnight{f 0 1 27}... That's six days from now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}The number of incidents has also been increasing as we've gotten closer to the full moon, so stay alert.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_118_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But still, I guess we have to do this no matter what...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_119_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Well, I guess we have to do this no matter what...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_122_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2025 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I've got butterflies in my stomach... You know, like right before a big match?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Now I know how Sanada-san feels before he gets in the ring...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_123_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 4 25 25}You're as cool as a cucumber, aren'tcha? Meanwhile, I think I'm gonna hurl...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I've got butterflies in my stomach... You know, like right before a big match?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Now I know how Sanada-san feels before he gets in the ring...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_126_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}That's really reassuring! I guess that's why you're the leader.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}By the way, we're going to have a quick meeting about the operation tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}So please return to the dorm immediately after school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_127_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 4 25 25}You should head back to the dorm right after school to get some rest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}That way you'll be alert for the meeting about the operation tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_128_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Uh, so... exams are coming up pretty soon. Have you been studyin'?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_132_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Thank god today's the last day of exams.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_134_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}You gotta let loose during summer, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_135_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}You gotta let loose during summer, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_136_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}After we defeat all the Shadows and the Dark Hour disappears, what's gonna happen then?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_138_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2077 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Well, regular people don't even know about the Dark Hour to begin with, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}That means no one will ever know about anything we've done...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I mean, I get it'd be a huge problem if they did, but it just kinda sucks, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_139_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Well, regular people don't even know about the Dark Hour to begin with, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}That means no one will ever know about anything we've done...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I mean, I get it'd be a huge problem if they did, but it just kinda sucks, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_140_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2088 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Dude, summer break starts tomorrow! It's prime time for a little beachside romance![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}You know, I bet other guys would kill to be in our shoes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}After all, we're staying in the same dorm as three super cute girls. You think so, too, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_142_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2066 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}But if you wanna be more than friends... you've got a lot of work ahead of you.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 6 25 25}Kirijo-senpai is top of the class and student council president. You'd have to be an uber nerd for her to even give you the time of day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 6 25 25}Yuka-tan's pretty popular, too. You gotta be as stylin' as she is to be a good match.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 6 25 25}Fuuka is... well, soft-spoken and kinda hard to grasp? So you might need to take the initiative with her, I guess.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 4 25 25}...Anyways, keep this hush-hush between us, alright?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_143_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Well, if you wanna be more than friends... you've got a lot of work ahead of you.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Kirijo-senpai is top of the class and student council president. You'd have to be an uber nerd for her to even give you the time of day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Yuka-tan's pretty popular, too. You gotta be as stylin' as she is to be a good match.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Fuuka is... well, soft-spoken and kinda hard to grasp? So you might need to take the initiative with her, I guess.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 4 25 25}...Anyways, keep this hush-hush between us, alright?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_144_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6142 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I see. This must be Tartarus during the daytime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_146_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Currently, I detect no Shadows in the vicinity. However, we must remain cautious at all times.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_148_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}A news report stated that the number of cases increases just before a full moon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}It looks like there are more cases than last month. This is the highest it's ever been.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_150_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I don't know the reason for the increase. We'll just have to remain alert at all times.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_151_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4052 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}I... I'm not sure yet. I only hope that we're able to put a stop to this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Anyway, we'll just have to remain alert at all times.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_152_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}The number of cases around town have gone up like crazy these days.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_154_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2068 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}There are only four of those large Shadows left... Maybe they're gettin' desperate?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}...Or maybe the next one's just insanely strong![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Oh, whoops, my bad. Haha, I shouldn't jinx it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Anyways, we can handle it this time, too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_155_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}There are only four of those large Shadows left... Maybe they're gettin' desperate?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}...Or maybe the next one's just insanely strong![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Oh, whoops, my bad. Haha, I shouldn't jinx it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Anyways, we can handle it this time, too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_156_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}The second semester just started, and there's already another full moon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I wonder what kind of Shadow will appear this time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_158_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Me too... It'd be nice if we had more info on our enemy beforehand, but my powers aren't strong enough for that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I just have to do my best supporting everyone so that they can fight with confidence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_159_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I can only provide support behind the scenes... But I'll do my best so all of you can fight with confidence![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_160_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}It doesn't seem like that Chidori girl is gonna talk, does it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Despite everything she did, Junpei is really worried about her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_163_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Maybe there's more to it than we know... Still, I'm a little worried.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_168_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}So... there's something bothering me lately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Why did Aragaki-senpai suddenly decide to come back?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_170_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}He doesn't seem like the type who'd rejoin just 'cause he likes to fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_171_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}He doesn't seem like the type who'd rejoin just 'cause he likes to fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_172_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Just three Shadows left, huh? And only three more weeks till the next one appears.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Personally, I'd rather take on all three at once to save us the trouble.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_174_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3131 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}But I guess it wouldn't be very interesting if we managed to get rid of them so easily.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Since we've got more manpower, it should be easier to defeat them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_175_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3131 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Haha, you're right. Every enemy we've faced has been stronger than the last.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But since we've got more manpower, it should be easier to defeat them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_176_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}It's been feeling a lot more like fall ever since the typhoon passed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I really hope the fighting ends before winter comes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_182_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Let's OWN that next Shadow and make the world a better place, yeah?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_183_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2007 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Whoa, get it together, dude. You're our leader! But no need to worry about me, I'm in top form![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Let's OWN that next Shadow and make the world a better place, yeah?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_186_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I cannot explain why, but our highest priority should be eliminating the remaining Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_187_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I cannot explain why, but our highest priority should be eliminating the remaining Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_188_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Normally, after a successful operation, the number of Apathy Syndrome cases decreases... However, this time it's the opposite.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}There's only one Shadow left. It must be apprehensive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_190_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}If that's indeed the case, then we'll put it to rest with the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}In any event, if it weren't for you, we wouldn't be here... So thank you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_191_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}But I know that, if it weren't for you, we wouldn't be here... So thank you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_192_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}It's already mid-October, and we're about two weeks away from the final battle...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}So much has happened, and it all went by so fast. But it made me realize...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}I'm so glad everyone welcomed me to the team... Thank you, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_195_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5098 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 4 25 25}Oh! Um, I didn't think you'd say something like that... But that means a lot to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Thank you. Let's do our best in the final battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_196_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}There's gonna be another full moon soon... Then we'll finally be done.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_199_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1089 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}C'mon! Show some spirit! Let's celebrate when this is all over, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_202_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5108 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}I shouldn't be surprised you're as calm as always, Leader.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I'm positive that the last Shadow will appear tomorrow, but Strega might be up to something as well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_203_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I'm positive that the last Shadow will appear tomorrow, but Strega might be up to something as well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_204_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Hope your stomach's up to celebrating tonight. 'Cause we're gonna stuff our faces with sushi![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_206_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2031 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Me too! I haven't eaten anything since yesterday![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}You better come back right after school, man! I'll be waiting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_207_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2073 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Y-You've got a point! This is Kirijo-senpai we're talkin' about... Maybe we'll get crab and blowfish!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Man, I can't wait! You better come back right after school![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_208_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I heard Kirijo-senpai is coming back today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_210_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}What should I even say to her...? I wouldn't be surprised if she's not up for talking, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_211_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}What should I even say to her...? I wouldn't be surprised if she's not up for talking, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_212_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}...I intend to do my best to protect everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_214_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6031 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}...It's nothing, please don't worry about it. I just wanted to share my feelings with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_216_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Things have been pretty crazy lately, huh... No one's in the mood to talk, either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_218_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I guess that's all we can do. We still have to do our best at school, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_219_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 10 25 25}I just can't stop thinking about it... even when we still have to do our best at school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_220_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Um... Have you reached a decision about... you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_222_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}I wonder what everyone else is thinking. Amada-kun looked troubled too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_223_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}I see... You really are strong. To be honest, I'm really scared.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}I wonder what everyone else is thinking. Amada-kun looked troubled too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_224_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Even though we're about to face death, we're still going to school as if nothing's happened...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_226_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Even as we speak, the deadline is drawing closer... I just hope we can find the right answer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_227_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But I'm not trying to avoid it either. I want to believe that I'll reach an answer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_228_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4012 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Good morning. How does everyone seem regarding... that discussion?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_230_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But we can't continue on like this forever... We should talk with everyone tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_231_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Looks like neither of us came up with an answer either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But we can't continue on like this forever... We should talk with everyone tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_232_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}By the way, have you heard anything about the dates for the health checkup?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_234_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}...Anyway, it's seriously way too hot out here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Let's hurry and get inside. I need to be in a classroom with air-conditioning, stat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_235_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}...Anyway, it's seriously way too hot out here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Let's hurry and get inside. I need to be in a classroom with air-conditioning, stat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_236_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}On that note, let's not go to Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_238_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I'd like to look into Strega with the chairman's help.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}If I find out anything, I'll let you know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Also, I understand your circumstances last night, but try to avoid staying out late from now on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_239_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4052 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I want to look into some matters with the chairman's help.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Specifically about that group, Strega.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}If I find out anything, I'll let you know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Also, I understand your circumstances last night, but try to avoid staying out late from now on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_240_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1016 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Mornin', and um... thanks for deciding to join the team yesterday.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Since Sanada-senpai's injured, I was worried it was just going to be Kirijo-senpai and me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_242_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I wonder when he'll recover from his injury...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_243_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Yeah, Sanada-senpai was attacked by a Shadow the same night you collapsed, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}He said it was just a minor injury to his ribs, but still...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_244_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Um... It's a beautiful day, is it not? How are you faring today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_246_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 4 25 25}I've never had the chance to chat with someone on the way to school, so I got nervous...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But I think I'm getting used to life in the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Plus, I'm pretty excited about everything we can do there.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5075 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}I'd love to try caring for some plants up on the roof—anything, really—when I have the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_247_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 4 25 25}I've never had the chance to chat with someone on the way to school, so I got nervous...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}But I think I'm getting used to life in the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Plus, I'm pretty excited about everything we can do there.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5075 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}I'd love to try caring for some plants up on the roof—anything, really—when I have the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_248_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}We're supposed to gather in front of the faculty office during lunch.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_250_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}To be honest, I don't feel like doing it, but we don't have a choice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}And asking Mr. Ekoda for an explanation sounds like a total pain in the ass.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}This is so lame, especially after going to that spot behind the station at night.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_251_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2007 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Uh, dude, you serious? We're supposed to ask about Fuuka Yamagishi, remember?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}But asking Mr. Ekoda for an explanation sounds like a total pain in the ass.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}This is so lame, especially after going to that spot behind the station at night.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_252_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}I'm so glad I was invited to join. Plus, the dorm's pretty cozy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}But the best part is that we're the only ones who can fight these Shad— Er, enemies![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_254_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Who wouldn't be stoked about fighting for justice!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Though to be perfectly honest... I ain't got a single clue what we're supposed to be doing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But I'm sure we'll find out. They did say that they'll explain everything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_255_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2007 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}C'mon, you can't be serious. We're basically superheroes fighting for justice![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}You're part of the team, too, so you should get your head in the game.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Though to be perfectly honest... I ain't got a single clue what we're supposed to be doing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But I'm sure we'll find out. They did say that they'll explain everything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_256_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Um... It's a beautiful day, is it not? How are you faring today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_258_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 4 25 25}I've never had the chance to chat with someone on the way to school, so I got nervous...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But I think I'm getting used to life in the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Plus, I'm pretty excited about everything we can do there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Let's tend to the plants up on the rooftop again soon.[n]{f 1 1}
